metadata.title: Hair Salon Phương — Editorial Hair Craft in District 10
metadata.description: Premium haircuts, color, and styling in the heart of District 10, Ho Chi Minh City. Where passion meets perfection.

home.slogan: The surprising truth is that doing HAIR doesn't come from TALENT — it comes from PASSION
home.subtitle: Premium haircuts & styling in the heart of District 10
home.gallerySubtitle: See what we've crafted for our clients
home.philosophyBody: Great hair is not a gift you're born with. It's a discipline, an obsession, a craft sharpened over thousands of heads. We believe in the latter — and it shows in every cut.
home.finalSubtitle: Speak directly with the salon. No forms, no waiting — just a conversation and an appointment.

steps.text: We listen — your hair, your life, your routine.
We design — a shape that fits your face and your hands.
We craft — with precision, product, and patience.
You leave — confident, every single time.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: A passion for hair that spans years of dedication
about.paragraph1: Welcome to Hair Salon Phuong, where every haircut is a work of art. Founded on the belief that great hair comes from passion, not just talent, we've been serving the District 10 community with dedication and care.
about.paragraph2: Our team brings together years of experience and a genuine love for the craft. We believe that every client deserves to leave feeling confident and beautiful.
about.value1: Quality Products — We use only professional-grade products
about.value2: Personalized Service — Every client gets a tailored consultation
about.value3: Continuous Learning — We stay current with trends and techniques
about.address: 244 Vinh Vien, Phuong 4, District 10, Ho Chi Minh City

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional hair care tailored to you

gallery.title: Our Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Real work, real clients, real results

reviews.title: What Our Clients Say
reviews.subtitle: We're proud of the feedback we receive from our valued clients

reviews.name: Ngoc Tran
reviews.text: Best salon in District 10! The team is incredibly skilled and always listens to what I want. My go-to place for haircuts.

reviews.name: Minh Anh
reviews.text: I've been coming here for years. Professional, friendly, and consistent quality. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Thanh Hoa
reviews.text: Amazing balayage work! The color turned out exactly how I imagined. Will definitely come back.

reviews.name: Quoc Bao
reviews.text: Great barber shop vibes. Clean cuts, reasonable pricing, and the staff really care about their work.

reviews.name: Linh Chi
reviews.text: Took my son here for his first haircut. They were so patient and gentle with him. Wonderful experience!

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Book your appointment today!
contact.bookingNote: Booking by phone only — no online form.

items.q: Do I need an appointment, or can I walk in?
items.a: Both are welcome. Walk-ins are taken in order of arrival, but to avoid a wait — especially evenings and weekends — we recommend calling ahead to reserve your slot.
Yes. Motorbike parking is available right out front on Vĩnh Viễn, and there is paid car parking within a short walk of the salon.
Absolutely. We're patient and gentle with little ones, and a child's first haircut is something we take pride in making comfortable and fun.

items.q: Why don't you list fixed prices?
items.a: Because every head of hair is different. Length, density, and the technique required all change the work — so we quote honestly after seeing your hair in person, never a one-size-fits-all number.
Only professional-grade products from trusted brands. If you'd like to take a product home to maintain your look, just ask your stylist.

items.q: Can I bring a reference photo?
items.a: Please do. A photo is the fastest way to align on what you want — bring as many as you like and we'll talk through what's achievable for your hair.

footer.tagline: Where passion meets perfection. Book your appointment today.
